title: CACOON - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS PUBLIC HEALTH CACOON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Public health nurse home visiting program that provides support to families with children and youth with special health care needs. Home visitors help families coordinate care for their children, connect with healthcare, community support, and make sure their child’s health team works together. Helps prepare older youth with special health needs for the transition to adulthood. 2111 8th Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-21 with chronic health or developmental conditions Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 842-3943 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 842-3943 Main phone (800) 735-2900 TTY/TTD (800) 528-2938 Toll-free Main phone (503) 842-3943 Allison Bonato [email protected] Alternate (503) 842-3900 ext 3931 Rochelle Phillips Alternate (503) 842-3940 Public Health Nurse Line INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at 8th Street and Pacific Avenue Services: Case/Care Management * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Home Based Parenting Education * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - FOOD HANDLER CARD ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND IMPROVEMENT - WATER QUALITY ASSURANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST!
